SPIRE1REVAMPED-BRUTALITY_POWER.descripti: Whenever you lose HP, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card at the start of your next turn.

SPIRE1REVAMPED-DISARM_POWER.description: Whenever you lose HP on your turn, ALL enemies lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.

SPIRE1REVAMPED-DISARM_POWER.title: Disarm

SPIRE1REVAMPED-IMPOTENCE_POWER.descripti: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold] for each card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
